root.speaker: Mounter Vest
root.text:
I keep the table of attachments. Every path to every place
that hangs off the trunk of the realm.

auto.speaker: Mounter Vest
auto.text:
It means the place attaches itself when the realm wakes.
You don't have to ask. You don't have to remember.

noatime.speaker: Mounter Vest
noatime.text:
It means the place doesn't write down when you last
visited. Some things are gentler that way.

props.message:
Scrolled across the wall:

/dev/sda1   /          ext4   defaults  0 1

Six mounts. Every place attached, every place auto.

Vest is proud of the auto column.
